interactions.summary: And the greater Israel project covers all of this region here from Turkey, Egypt, Yemen, Oman. So the greater Israel project is like this, okay? So it goes from the Nile in Egypt to the Euphrates in Iraq. And it covers part of Turkey, of Syria, of Lebanon, of Jordan, and parts of Saudi Arabia, which also includes Mecca and Medina. What is your next prediction? NATO and Russia will fight for Odessa. Odessa? What's Ode...
